literal: a fragile or easily broken object or thing that can be extinguished or destroyed by external forces

to be unable to physically attend or be present at a place or event
a situation that, once started or touched, will cause many problems or complications

relabelled_senses.definition: To be completely unable to sing in tune; to have very poor or no musical pitch when singing.

literal: no literal meaning
to be unable to get enough of something because one wants more
to be unable to tolerate or endure someone or something
to be unable to look at or endure the sight of someone or something because it causes disgust or revulsion
to be unable or unwilling to wait any longer; to be eager or impatient
to beg or plead humbly or submissively for help or favor
to add a final touch or event that completes or crowns a series of events
to act recklessly or impulsively without regard for consequences
a player chosen by the captain's personal decision rather than by formal qualification
to have no interest or concern for something; to be indifferent
to be completely indifferent or not care at all about something
to have very little or no concern or interest; to regard something as unimportant
to not care at all; to feel no concern or sympathy
a parcel containing food, clothing, or comforts sent to someone away from home
customers who are affluent or fashionable; high-status clientele
a policy using both rewards (carrot) and punishments (stick) to influence behavior
